title: Kainan #2536
definition:
Cainan = "their smith"

 1) the son of Enos, \\#Ge 5:9\\
 2) son of Arphaxad and ancestor of Christ, \\#Lu 3:36\\

 2) son of Arphaxad and ancestor of Christ, \\#Lu 3:36\\
